Assoc. Prof. Dr. Emrullah Fatih Yetkin Receives TÜBİTAK 1001 Project Support

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by

Assoc. Prof. Emrullah Fatih Yetkin

from the Department of Management Information Systems  and entitled “Development of a Novel Data Privacy Approach for Machine Learning in Cloud Systems” has been funded by

TUBİTAK 1001 – The Scientific and Technological Research Projects Funding Program.

This project addresses growing concerns around data privacy in shared computing environments such as cloud systems and the Internet of Things. It proposes a mathematical method to ensure the secure sharing of personal and institutional data with third parties, while preserving its utility.

Assist. Prof. Tuğçe Ballı takes part in the project as a Researcher. We congratulate our faculty member for her achievement and wish her continued success.

We also would like to thank Prof. Dr. Hasan Dağ, Assoc. Prof. Taner Arsan and Assoc. Prof. Oğuzhan Ceylan for their valuable contributions during the panels.
